field.label: Enabled
field.help: This will enable or disable this forwarder.

field.label: IP Address
field.help: Set the IPv4 or IPv6 address of the upstream DNS server. For a local encryption proxy such as contrld, use 127.0.0.1.

field.label: Port
field.help: Set the destination port. Defaults to 53; use a custom port for a local proxy (e.g. 5300).
